docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY MANAGO, MICHELLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,127.85 FILED BY MANAGO, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, EVELYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANAGO, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, EVELYN $2,127.85 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,177.85, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED CLAIM; DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO EVELYN ALVAREZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, EVELYN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANAGO, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, EVELYN
